understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' in the semantic grid, with the additional constraint that if there are multiple goals they must all be occupied simultaneously for the level to register WIN, and to complete all levels within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; movement could be stopped by walls/boundaries or other objects, and the 'movement.*_blocked' indicator was only a hint rather than a guarantee. Some adjacent objects could be pushable, moving together with the selected piece when pushed. Levels could include multiple selectables; control could be switched using CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinates of another selectable, and clicking elsewhere or on non-selectable positions had no effect.
